title: D365 Contact Center Multi-Agent Orchestrator Template
description: Schema for validating a parent orchestrator agent in a multi-agent real-time voice setup. The orchestrator handles identity verification, intent detection, and routing to child agents.

instruction_version.description: Semantic version of this instruction set (e.g. '1.0')

agent_name.description: Configuration name of this agent as registered in D365. Must match exactly.

voice_rules.description: Behavioral rules governing how the agent speaks and responds

digit_rules.description: Rules for capturing numeric and alphanumeric identifiers (member ID, RX numbers, etc.)

scope.description: List of supported intent areas the orchestrator can route

description.description: Human-readable description of this orchestrator's role

child_configs.description: Map of logical intent names to child agent configuration names in D365

conversation_states.description: Ordered list of states the orchestrator moves through during a call

instructions.description: Step-by-step behavioral instructions for this state

transitions.description: Conditions that move the conversation to another state

next_step.description: ID of the state to transition to

condition.description: Human-readable condition that triggers this transition
